# Feature Request Template

**Title**: [Clear, descriptive feature name]

**Priority**: [P1-Critical|P2-High|P3-Medium|P4-Low]
**Type**: [New Feature|Enhancement|Refactor|Research]
**Estimated Complexity**: [S|M|L|XL]

## Problem Statement

[Describe the problem this feature solves or the need it addresses]

### Current State
[What is the current behavior or limitation?]

### Desired State
[What should the system do after this feature is implemented?]

## User Scenarios

### Primary User Story
[As a <type of user>, I want <some goal> so that <some reason>]

### Acceptance Scenarios
1. **Given** [initial condition], **When** [action], **Then** [expected result]
2. **Given** [initial condition], **When** [action], **Then** [expected result]
